name: pr_cep_acc_drain_updel_plainsrc
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x"); $c : count() ) then end
_finding: D-160 SCOPE GUARD: the same update-admits-then-delete over a PLAIN (non-event) source in a NON-stream session stays SILENT (oracle: 1 firing, the initial W:0) - plain ops batch in one staging window and the ins+del pair annihilates with no entry-wise dirty. The D-160 gate (event_specs.contains_key(source)) must exclude this cell; gen.rs can reach the shape on the main axis.
